caption: A man with a beard, wearing a dark grey vest over a light-colored shirt, speaks into a microphone labeled "ANI" while standing outdoors in front of a green lawn and trees. The scene is framed by a red news broadcast layout with several smaller portrait photos of political figures and accompanying text. The top banner contains the text "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है," and the bottom of the screen features a yellow "BREAKING NEWS" ticker and a timestamp of "10:02 PM." Smaller text labels include "डिप्टी CM" and "मंत्री" alongside names such as "सबरात चौधरी," "विजय सिन्हा," and "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार." Across the sequence, the on-screen graphics shift; in the final frames, a photo of a man appears on the left with the text "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार" and "नीतीश" highlighted in yellow. The speaker remains central and stationary throughout the clip.
